title: Release Gate Configuration
description: Schema for .ai-governance/release-gate.json — defines which gates are active per release mode (NORMAL, SAFE, EMERGENCY).

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support.

modes.description: Gate activation settings per release mode.

NORMAL.description: Standard release flow. All gates operate at baseline thresholds.

SAFE.description: Stricter release flow. Higher thresholds and mandatory cross-verification.

EMERGENCY.description: Emergency bypass flow. Minimal gates with mandatory post-evaluation.

mode_config.description: Configuration for a single release mode.

gate_1.description: Gate 1: Static Analysis (tsc, eslint, audit, import validation).

gate_2.description: Gate 2: Confidence Score evaluation against golden set.

gate_3.description: Gate 3: Cross-Verification by multiple AI agents.

escape_hatch.description: Whether emergency bypass (escape hatch) is available in this mode.

post_eval_required.description: Whether post-evaluation is mandatory after release in this mode.

threshold_multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to base confidence thresholds. >1.0 = stricter, <1.0 = looser.

gate_setting.description: Individual gate activation and blocking behavior.

enabled.description: Whether this gate is active in the given mode.

blocking.description: If true, gate failure blocks the release. If false, failure is advisory only.

timeout_minutes.description: Maximum time in minutes before the gate is considered failed.
